meaning: to be studying (at a school or research institute)
sentence: 她目前是一名在读研究生。
pinyin: Tā mùqián shì yī míng zài dú yánjiūshēng.
english: She is currently an enrolled graduate student.

meaning: to be bold enough to speak out
sentence: 她是公司里少数敢言的员工之一。
pinyin: Tā shì gōngsī lǐ shǎoshù gǎn yán de yuángōng zhī yī.
english: She is one of the few employees at the company bold enough to speak out.

meaning: to write an inscription (poem, remark, autograph etc); an inscription
sentence: 作者在书的扉页上亲笔题字。
pinyin: Zuòzhě zài shū de fēiyè shàng qīnbǐ tí zì.
english: The author personally wrote an inscription on the front page of the book.

sentence: 村里的水塔已经用了三十年了。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ de shuǐ tǎ yǐjīng yòng le sānshí nián le.
english: The village water tower has been in use for thirty years.

sentence: 没有凭据，这件事很难说清楚。
pinyin: Méiyǒu píng jù, zhè jiàn shì hěn nán shuō qīngchǔ.
english: Without evidence, it's hard to explain this matter clearly.
